description: Brendan Eich discusses the integration of Solana into the Brave browser, emphasizing its potential to serve as a gateway for a billion crypto users. He highlights the importance of making DAPPs Solana-enabled by default and simplifying user experiences in DeFi and NFTs.
topic_summary: Eich presents on the evolution of the web and the role of Solana in enhancing user access to decentralized applications and services, aiming to streamline NFT transactions and yield earning.
